chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 2195 of 2017 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 24.01.2018 For orders on office objection For orders on MA 7874/17 For katcha peshi Petitioner present in person Syed Awais Shah, advocate files power of Raja Jawad Ali Sahar for respondent Nos. 4, 5 and 6. Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, Asstt: A.G. along with SIP Khadim Hussain SHO PS Kotri. Learned Asst. A.G. has filed comments of official respondents which are taken on record. Through this petition, the petitioners have sought legal protection. Learned A.A.G. is present and states that the official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law and shall provide the same protection to the petitioners as is available to other citizen of country. In view of statement of learned A.A.G. the present petition is disposed of. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
